title: 3D Mini Golf
gamedescription: 3D Mini Golf offers a collection of themed courses with realistic physics and accessible gameplay. Play solo or compete locally with friends across multiple environments and challenge modes.

title: AdVenture Capitalist
gamedescription: AdVenture Capitalist is a satirical idle-clicker business simulation where players invest in lemonade stands, oil companies, and everything in between to build a capitalist empire. Automate profits, hire managers, and expand across multiple planets.

title: American Ninja Warrior: Challenge
gamedescription: American Ninja Warrior: Challenge brings the intense obstacle course competition to consoles. Create your athlete, train their skills, and compete locally with friends across iconic stages inspired by the hit TV show.

title: Angry Alligator
gamedescription: Angry Alligator is an open-world adventure where you grow from a tiny gator into a massive apex predator. Explore swamps, forests, and farms, complete quirky quests, and chomp your way through a colorful world filled with wildlife and humans.

title: Arcade Paradise
gamedescription: Arcade Paradise transforms a rundown laundromat into a thriving retro arcade empire. Wash clothes, earn cash, buy cabinets, and play over 35 fully featured arcade games while expanding and customizing your business.

title: Arkanoid: Eternal Battle
gamedescription: Arkanoid: Eternal Battle reinvents the legendary brick-breaker with modern visuals, new modes, and a competitive 25-player online Battle Royale. Master power-ups, defeat DOH, and climb the global rankings in this fast-paced arcade revival.

dlc.dlcdescription: The Space Scout Pack adds exclusive cosmetic items to customize your paddle and profile in Arkanoid: Eternal Battle.

title: Astroneer
gamedescription: Astroneer is an interplanetary sandbox adventure where players explore, craft, and terraform vibrant alien worlds. Gather resources, build bases, and collaborate online to uncover the mysteries of the solar system.

dlc.dlcdescription: A cosmetic bundle featuring sporty suit and visor styles.
A collection of essential cosmetic items for your Astroneer.
Premium Glitchwalker-themed cosmetics for advanced customization.
A cosmetic pack featuring Glitchwalker suit variations.
A beginner-friendly cosmetic bundle for new explorers.
A set of additional suit styles for character customization.

title: Atomfall
gamedescription: Atomfall is a post-disaster action adventure set in a quarantined British countryside. Explore abandoned towns, scavenge supplies, uncover government secrets, and survive against mutated threats and hostile factions.

dlc.dlcdescription: A starter pack containing basic resources and cosmetic items.
Upgrades the game with deluxe cosmetic items and bonuses.
A larger bundle of supplies and cosmetic enhancements.

dlc.dlcname: Story Expansion Pack The Red Strain
dlc.dlcdescription: A major story expansion introducing new regions, missions, and enemies.
A story-driven expansion set on a mysterious and dangerous island.

title: ATV Drift and Tricks
gamedescription: ATV Drift and Tricks is an arcade off-road racer focused on exaggerated drifting, big jumps, and fast-paced stunt action. Race solo or compete locally with friends across varied tracks and challenge modes.

title: Autobahn Police Simulator 3
gamedescription: Autobahn Police Simulator 3 puts you in the role of a German highway patrol officer. Respond to accidents, conduct traffic stops, pursue suspects, and complete a wide range of missions across an open-world autobahn network.

title: Autonauts
gamedescription: Autonauts is a creative automation and colony-building game where players program worker bots, gather resources, craft tools, and develop a thriving settlement. Teach robots tasks using simple visual coding and expand your automated world.

title: Battleship
gamedescription: Battleship brings the classic naval strategy game to consoles with modern visuals and explosive effects. Position your fleet, scan the seas, and outmaneuver opponents in both classic and enhanced tactical modes.

title: Bee Simulator
gamedescription: Bee Simulator lets you experience the world through the eyes of a honeybee. Explore a vibrant park, collect pollen, defend your hive, and complete missions solo or with friends in cooperative and competitive modes.

title: Big Buck Arcade
gamedescription: Big Buck Arcade brings the classic fast-paced hunting experience to consoles. Track wildlife across multiple environments, compete for high scores, and enjoy arcade-style shooting action solo or with friends.

title: Block Cascade
gamedescription: Block Cascade is a colorful puzzle game where players rotate and drop blocks to create chain reactions. Match colors, clear the board, and chase high scores in this fast-paced arcade-style experience.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds additional color themes and visual variations for blocks.

title: Bloons TD 5
gamedescription: Bloons TD 5 is a tower defense strategy game where players deploy monkey towers, upgrades, and special agents to stop waves of colorful bloons. Featuring co-op play, challenge modes, and endless strategic depth, it's a fan-favorite entry in the Bloons series.

title: Boggle
gamedescription: Boggle brings the classic fast-paced word search game to PS4 with modern visuals and multiple modes. Find as many words as possible before time runs out, compete locally or online, and challenge players worldwide.

title: Bomberman Party Edition
gamedescription: Bomberman Party Edition is a classic multiplayer action game featuring explosive maze battles, power-ups, and fast-paced competitive gameplay. Enjoy both the original retro mode and an enhanced modern version with updated visuals.

title: Brick Breaker
gamedescription: Brick Breaker is a modern take on the classic arcade formula. Smash through waves of colorful bricks, collect power-ups, and chase high scores across multiple levels in this fast-paced, minimalist action game.

title: Bridge Constructor
gamedescription: Bridge Constructor challenges players to design and build bridges capable of supporting vehicles across increasingly complex gaps. Use physics-based engineering, multiple materials, and creative problem-solving to construct stable and efficient structures.

title: Carnival Games VR
gamedescription: Carnival Games VR brings classic midway attractions to life in virtual reality. Step into a vibrant carnival world and play immersive mini-games using PS Move controllers, from shooting galleries to ring toss challenges.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds the Alley Adventure mini-game expansion, featuring new challenges and carnival activities.

title: Catan VR
gamedescription: Catan VR brings the iconic strategy board game to life in virtual reality. Trade, build, and settle on the island of Catan with immersive environments, animated pieces, and online multiplayer against players worldwide.

title: Chef Life: A Restaurant Simulator
gamedescription: Chef Life: A Restaurant Simulator puts you in charge of running your own restaurant. Manage ingredients, design menus, cook dishes, customize your dining space, and build your reputation as you grow from a small eatery to a culinary destination.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds new oven-based recipes and Italian-inspired dishes to your restaurant.
Introduces new gourmet recipes and premium ingredients for advanced chefs.
Adds experimental cooking tools and advanced preparation techniques.

title: Climber: Sky Is The Limit
gamedescription: Climber: Sky Is The Limit is a realistic mountaineering survival game where players scale some of the world's most dangerous peaks. Manage stamina, equipment, weather, and strategic decisions as every climb becomes a battle against nature.

title: Clustertruck
gamedescription: Clustertruck is a high-speed platformer where players leap across moving trucks while avoiding chaotic hazards. With physics-driven movement, escalating difficulty, and unpredictable levels, every run becomes a frantic test of reflexes and precision.

title: Crash Bandicoot N. Sane Trilogy
gamedescription: Crash Bandicoot N. Sane Trilogy remasters the first three classic Crash games with modern graphics, improved animations, and enhanced controls. Relive Crashs iconic adventures across challenging platforming levels rebuilt from the ground up.

title: Creed: Rise to Glory
gamedescription: Creed: Rise to Glory is a cinematic VR boxing experience where you step into the gloves of Adonis Creed. Train with Rocky Balboa, fight iconic opponents, and rise through the ranks using immersive VR mechanics and intense, physics-driven combat.

title: Dave Mirra Freestyle BMX 2 (PS2)
gamedescription: Dave Mirra Freestyle BMX 2 is a classic extreme sports title featuring open environments, trick-based gameplay, and a roster of pro BMX riders. Perform combos, complete challenges, and explore diverse parks in this iconic PS2-era BMX experience.

title: Dave The Diver
gamedescription: Dave The Diver is a hybrid deep sea adventure and restaurant management game. Explore the mysterious Blue Hole by day, catch exotic fish, and run a bustling sushi bar by night. Discover secrets, upgrade gear, and meet a quirky cast of characters.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds crossover content inspired by DREDGE, including new missions and eerie deep sea encounters.
Introduces Godzilla themed content, featuring special events, missions, and unique ocean encounters.
Adds festive holiday themed items and Ichiban inspired cosmetic content.

title: Disney Dreamlight Valley
gamedescription: Disney Dreamlight Valley is a life-sim adventure where you restore a magical world alongside iconic Disney and Pixar characters. Farm, craft, explore, and build friendships as you uncover the mystery behind the Forgetting.

title: Dog The Dog Takes The Hindmost
gamedescription: Dog The Dog Takes The Hindmost is a small-scale indie adventure title featuring simple mechanics and quirky themes. Explore light puzzles and casual objectives in a short, experimental experience.

title: DreamWorks All Star Kart Racing
gamedescription: DreamWorks All Star Kart Racing brings together characters from across the DreamWorks universe in a colorful, fast-paced kart racer. Drift, boost, and race through themed tracks inspired by beloved animated films.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds new kart customization items and themed racing content.

title: Dredge
gamedescription: Dredge is a sinister fishing adventure where you explore eerie waters, uncover dark secrets, and upgrade your vessel while managing inventory and sanity. Strange creatures lurk beneath the waves, and not everything you catch should be brought to shore.

dlc.dlcdescription: Unlocks the mysterious Blackstone region and grants access to exclusive items.
Adds a new storyline centered around industrial expansion and deep-sea dangers.
Explore a frozen biome filled with new fish, quests, and chilling mysteries.

title: Dysmantle
gamedescription: Dysmantle is a post-apocalyptic action RPG where nearly everything in the world can be dismantled for crafting materials. Explore, fight mutated creatures, build outposts, and uncover the mysteries of the island as you attempt to escape.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds a new storyline featuring doomsday cultists, quests, and unique gear.
Introduces pet companions and new dungeon areas filled with challenges.
Adds a massive Underworld biome with new enemies, loot, and endgame content.

title: EA Sports FC 25
gamedescription: EA Sports FC 25 continues the evolution of the worlds most popular football simulation, offering refined gameplay, updated rosters, enhanced animations, and expanded modes including Ultimate Team, Career, and Clubs.

title: EA Sports FC 26
gamedescription: EA Sports FC 26 advances the global football experience with refined gameplay, updated leagues, enhanced animations, and expanded modes including Ultimate Team, Career, and Clubs. Built for realism and competitive play.

title: EA Sports NHL 24
gamedescription: EA Sports NHL 24 delivers fast-paced hockey action with revamped physics, improved goalie AI, enhanced presentation, and expanded online modes including World of Chel and HUT. Experience authentic NHL gameplay with modern refinements.

title: EA Sports UFC 4
gamedescription: EA Sports UFC 4 delivers a refined MMA experience with fluid combat, dynamic grappling, and deep fighter customization. Rise through the ranks, build your legacy, and compete across multiple modes both online and offline.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds 100 UFC Points for in-game purchases.
Adds 250 UFC Points for in-game purchases.
Adds 500 UFC Points for in-game purchases.
Adds 750 UFC Points for in-game purchases.
Adds 1050 UFC Points for in-game purchases.
Adds 1600 UFC Points for in-game purchases.
Adds 2200 UFC Points for in-game purchases.

Adds 12000 UFC Points for in-game purchases.

Includes premium customization items and bonuses.

Adds Tyson Fury as a playable fighter.
Adds Bruce Lee in the Bantamweight division.
Adds Bruce Lee in the Featherweight division.
Adds Bruce Lee in the Lightweight division.
Adds Bruce Lee in the Welterweight division.
Includes all Bruce Lee fighters in one bundle.
Adds Backyard and Kumite themed customization items.
Adds colorful and whimsical vanity items.

title: Egg Runner
gamedescription: Egg Runner is a simple arcade-style game where you guide an egg through obstacle-filled paths, aiming for high scores and quick reflex challenges.

title: Eve Gunjack
gamedescription: Eve Gunjack is an immersive VR arcade shooter set in the EVE universe. Man a turret on a mining vessel and blast waves of enemies in fast-paced, high-intensity combat designed specifically for virtual reality.

title: Expeditions: A Mudrunner Game
gamedescription: Expeditions: A MudRunner Game is a realistic off-road exploration experience where players use specialized vehicles and scientific tools to traverse harsh terrain, complete research missions, and uncover remote landscapes.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds the Cotco Canyon region with new missions and exploration routes.
Includes exclusive vehicle cosmetics and early-game equipment.
Adds the classic Don 71 vehicle variant for off-road expeditions.

title: Family Feud
gamedescription: Family Feud brings the classic game show experience to PS4 with fast-paced trivia rounds, survey questions, and competitive multiplayer for friends and family.

title: Firefighting Simulator: The Squad
gamedescription: Firefighting Simulator: The Squad puts you in command of a team of firefighters as you respond to emergencies across a detailed city. Use authentic equipment, coordinate with AI or online teammates, and tackle intense fire scenarios.

title: Frostpunk
gamedescription: Frostpunk is a society survival game where players must build and manage the last city on Earth during a global freeze. Balance resources, enforce laws, and make difficult moral decisions to keep your people alive.

title: Garfield Kart Furious Racing
gamedescription: Garfield Kart Furious Racing is a colorful kart racer featuring Garfield and friends across themed tracks. Drift, boost, and use power-ups in competitive local multiplayer and splitscreen modes.

title: Ghostbusters: Spirits Unleashed Ecto Edition
gamedescription: Ghostbusters: Spirits Unleashed Ecto Edition is a 4v1 asymmetric multiplayer game where a team of Ghostbusters hunts down a player controlled ghost. Use proton packs, traps, and gadgets across iconic locations while leveling up gear and unlocking cosmetics.

title: Girlfriend From Hell
gamedescription: Girlfriend From Hell is a quirky indie adventure game where you navigate chaotic relationship scenarios, solve humorous challenges, and survive the wild antics of a supernatural partner.

title: Goat Simulator: The Bundle
gamedescription: Goat Simulator: The Bundle includes the original chaotic goat based sandbox along with its major expansions. Wreak havoc, explore absurd environments, and enjoy intentionally broken physics in this comedic open world experience.

title: Goat Simulator 3
gamedescription: Goat Simulator 3 is a chaotic open world sandbox adventure where you cause mayhem as Pilgor the goat. Explore a massive island, complete absurd missions, unlock gear, and wreak havoc alone or with friends in online multiplayer.

title: Green Hell
gamedescription: Green Hell is a realistic survival game set in the Amazon rainforest. Craft tools, build shelters, hunt for food, and fight to stay alive while uncovering the mystery behind your isolation. Play solo or survive together in online co op.

title: Grounded
gamedescription: Grounded is a cooperative survival adventure where players are shrunk to the size of insects and must explore a dangerous backyard ecosystem. Gather resources, craft gear, build bases, and survive alone or with friends in online multiplayer.

title: Guts & Glory
gamedescription: Guts & Glory is a chaotic physics based action game where ordinary people race through deadly obstacle courses filled with hazards, traps, and over the top carnage. Survive the madness and reach the finish line in one piece.

title: Hasbro Family Fun Pack: Conquest Edition
gamedescription: Hasbro Family Fun Pack: Conquest Edition brings together classic Hasbro board games with modern visuals and multiplayer support. Play with friends locally or online across a variety of family friendly game modes.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds Just Dance themed content to the game selection.
Adds My Little Pony themed content to the game selection.
Adds Raving Rabbids themed content to the game selection.

title: Hasbro Family Fun Pack
gamedescription: Hasbro Family Fun Pack brings together four classic Hasbro board games in one collection. Play Monopoly, Scrabble, Trivial Pursuit, and Risk with friends locally or online in a family friendly party experience.

title: Hungry Shark World
gamedescription: Hungry Shark World is an action packed arcade game where you control a growing shark, devouring everything in your path. Explore oceans, unlock new shark species, and survive increasingly dangerous waters.

title: Hustle Kings
gamedescription: Hustle Kings is a realistic pool simulation game featuring precision physics, online competition, and stylish presentation. Compete in tournaments, challenge friends locally or online, and master a variety of cue sports modes.

title: I Am Bread
gamedescription: I Am Bread is a quirky physics based adventure where you guide a slice of bread on a journey to become toast. Navigate everyday environments, avoid hazards, and master intentionally chaotic controls in this comedic challenge.

title: I Expect You To Die 2
gamedescription: I Expect You To Die 2 is a VR spy themed puzzle adventure where you use telekinesis, gadgets, and clever problem solving to survive deadly escape room scenarios. Outsmart traps, infiltrate enemy bases, and uncover a global conspiracy.

title: I Expect You To Die
gamedescription: I Expect You To Die is a VR escape room puzzle adventure where you play as an elite secret agent using telekinesis and clever problem solving to survive deadly missions. Outsmart traps, infiltrate enemy facilities, and complete high stakes operations.

title: It Takes Two
gamedescription: It Takes Two is a critically acclaimed co op adventure where two players work together through imaginative worlds filled with puzzles, platforming, and emotional storytelling. Designed exclusively for cooperative play, it blends creativity, humor, and heartfelt moments.

title: Jewel Fever 2
gamedescription: Jewel Fever 2 is a classic match 3 puzzle game featuring colorful gems, fast paced gameplay, and multiple challenge modes. Match jewels, trigger combos, and aim for high scores in this casual arcade experience.

title: Job Simulator
gamedescription: Job Simulator is a comedic VR experience set in a future where robots have replaced all human jobs. Step into simulated workplaces, complete absurd tasks, and enjoy playful physics-driven interactions in a lighthearted virtual world.

title: Jumanji: The Video Game
gamedescription: Jumanji: The Video Game is a cooperative action adventure where players team up as iconic heroes to recover the stolen Jewel of Jumanji. Battle enemies, survive traps, and explore dangerous environments in both local and online multiplayer modes.

title: Jumanji: Wild Adventures
gamedescription: Jumanji: Wild Adventures is a cooperative action adventure where players explore dangerous jungles, battle enemies, and uncover hidden treasures. Team up locally with friends in a four player adventure filled with traps, puzzles, and wild encounters.

title: Just Cause 3
gamedescription: Just Cause 3 is an explosive open world action game where Rico Rodriguez returns to liberate the Mediterranean island of Medici. Use grappling hooks, wingsuits, and massive firepower to topple a brutal dictatorship in spectacular fashion.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds the Sky Fortress campaign, jetpack, and new missions.
Introduces mechs, a new island, and a full mission chain.
Adds the Sea Heist campaign, new vehicles, and weapons.
Adds flame themed wingsuit and parachute skins.

title: LEGO Brawls
gamedescription: LEGO Brawls is a family friendly multiplayer fighting game where players build custom LEGO minifigures and battle across iconic LEGO themes. Team up or compete in fast paced modes both locally and online.

title: LEGO Indiana Jones: The Original Adventures
gamedescription: LEGO Indiana Jones: The Original Adventures recreates the iconic moments of the classic films with LEGO humor and puzzle platforming gameplay. Explore temples, solve environmental challenges, and collect artifacts across a lighthearted handheld adventure.

title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
gamedescription: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes brings together iconic characters from across the Marvel Universe in a humorous action adventure. Battle villains, explore an open LEGO New York, and unlock heroes with unique abilities in classic LEGO gameplay.

title: LEGO Party
gamedescription: LEGO Party is a family friendly collection of LEGO themed mini games designed for local multiplayer fun. Compete or cooperate across colorful challenges built around classic LEGO humor and accessible gameplay.

dlc.dlcdescription: Backport compatibility patch for LEGO Party.

title: LEGO Pirates of the Caribbean: The Video Game
gamedescription: LEGO Pirates of the Caribbean: The Video Game retells the adventures of Jack Sparrow and crew with classic LEGO humor. Explore iconic locations, solve puzzles, and relive scenes from all four films in a handheld action adventure experience.

title: Lemmings
gamedescription: Lemmings on PSP brings the classic puzzle gameplay to handheld, challenging players to guide groups of lemmings safely through traps and hazards using a variety of skills. A faithful remake with updated visuals and portable-friendly controls.

title: Lethal VR
gamedescription: Lethal VR is an immersive virtual reality arcade shooter inspired by classic FBI and SWAT training simulations. Test your accuracy and reflexes across a series of fast paced weapon challenges designed for PSVR.

title: LudoXXL
gamedescription: LudoXXL is a modern digital take on the classic board game, offering colorful visuals and easy-to-learn gameplay for all ages. Compete or cooperate locally with up to four players in this family-friendly party experience.

title: Mario Kart Homebrew
gamedescription: Mario Kart Homebrew is a fan made racing project inspired by Nintendos iconic kart series. Featuring custom tracks, characters, and arcade style gameplay, this homebrew build delivers a fast and colorful racing experience on PS4 compatible hardware.

title: Minecraft Dungeons: Ultimate Edition
gamedescription: Minecraft Dungeons: Ultimate Edition includes the full game and all DLC expansions. Battle through dungeons, biomes, and boss encounters in a cooperative action adventure inspired by classic dungeon crawlers.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds snowy biomes, missions, and gear.
Introduces the End dimension and new challenges.
Adds Nether biomes, missions, and gear.
Includes hero skins and bonus content.
Underwater missions and ocean themed gear.
Mountain biomes, storms, and new enemies.

title: Minecraft Legends
gamedescription: Minecraft Legends is an action strategy adventure where players unite the Overworld against the Piglin invasion. Build alliances, command troops, and explore a vibrant world in both solo and cooperative modes.

dlc.dlcdescription: Backport compatibility patch for Minecraft Legends.

title: Minecraft: PlayStation 4 Edition
gamedescription: Minecraft: PlayStation 4 Edition brings the iconic block building sandbox to PS4 with enhanced performance, local and online multiplayer, and endless creative possibilities.

title: Minecraft: Story Mode - The Complete Adventure
gamedescription: Minecraft: Story Mode  The Complete Adventure includes all eight episodes of Telltales narrative-driven series. Join Jesse and friends on a cinematic journey filled with choices, exploration, and classic Minecraft charm.

title: Minecraft
gamedescription: Minecraft on PS4 delivers the full Bedrock Edition experience, featuring cross platform play, online multiplayer, and endless creative and survival gameplay.

title: Monopoly Family Fun Pack
gamedescription: Monopoly Family Fun Pack brings together multiple Monopoly experiences in one bundle, featuring classic gameplay, themed boards, and family friendly competitive fun both locally and online.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds My Little Pony themed content.

title: Monopoly Plus
gamedescription: Monopoly Plus brings the classic board game to life with a vibrant 3D city that evolves as you play. Enjoy local or online multiplayer with family-friendly competitive gameplay.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds My Little Pony themed content.

title: Monster Energy Supercross - The Official Videogame 6
gamedescription: Monster Energy Supercross - The Official Videogame 6 delivers authentic Supercross racing with official riders, bikes, and tracks. Compete in career mode, online races, or local split screen action.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds Pixel Blast themed customization items.

title: Monster Energy Supercross - The Official Videogame
gamedescription: Monster Energy Supercross - The Official Videogame brings the full 2017 Monster Energy AMA Supercross season to life with official riders, bikes, and tracks. Race through career mode, online events, or local split screen battles.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds new rider icons and butt patch customization.
Adds Bluefire themed rider customization items.
Unlocks the Compound free ride training area.
Adds the Monster Energy Cup track.
Adds Redfire themed rider customization items.
Adds themed bike liveries and a tracksuit.
Adds Yellowfire themed rider customization items.

title: MultiVersus
gamedescription: MultiVersus is a free to play platform fighter featuring characters from Warner Bros. universes. Battle online or locally in fast paced 1v1, 2v2, or free for all matches.

title: MX Nitro  Unleashed
gamedescription: MX Nitro  Unleashed is a fast paced motocross stunt racer featuring high speed tracks, trick focused gameplay, and competitive online and local multiplayer modes.

title: MX vs ATV Legends
gamedescription: MX vs ATV Legends delivers large open environments, career progression, and intense off road racing across bikes, ATVs, and UTVs. Compete online or locally in split screen races.

title: MXGP 2019 - The Official Motocross Videogame
gamedescription: MXGP 2019 brings the full 2019 FIM Motocross World Championship to life with official riders, bikes, and tracks. Race through career mode, online competitions, or local split screen battles.

title: MXGP PRO
gamedescription: MXGP PRO delivers a more realistic motocross simulation with advanced bike handling, official riders, and authentic tracks. Race through career mode, online events, or local split screen battles.

title: NBA 2K25
gamedescription: NBA 2K25 delivers the next evolution of basketball simulation with enhanced gameplay, deeper MyCAREER progression, expanded online modes, and authentic NBA presentation.

title: NBA Bounce
gamedescription: NBA Bounce is a compact arcade-style basketball experience designed for quick sessions and simple pick up and play action.

title: Nickelodeon All-Star Brawl 2
gamedescription: Nickelodeon All-Star Brawl 2 expands the chaotic platform fighting action with new characters, revamped mechanics, and fast-paced multiplayer battles both online and locally.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds 25 alternate costumes for various fighters.
Adds Iroh as a playable fighter with themed content.
Adds Mr. Krabs as a playable fighter with themed content.
Adds Rocksteady as a playable fighter with themed content.
Adds the Quickster costume for SpongeBob.
Adds Zuko as a playable fighter with themed content.

title: Nickelodeon Kart Racers 3: Slime Speedway Turbo Edition
gamedescription: Nickelodeon Kart Racers 3: Slime Speedway - Turbo Edition delivers fast-paced kart racing with a huge Nickelodeon roster, customizable karts, and chaotic local and online multiplayer action.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds the Turbo Pack with extra kart customization content.

title: Overcooked! 2
gamedescription: Overcooked! 2 brings chaotic cooperative cooking action with new recipes, kitchens, characters, and online multiplayer. Work together or fall apart in frantic culinary mayhem.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds campfire-themed levels, chefs, and recipes.
Adds carnival-themed kitchens, recipes, and chefs.

dlc.dlcname: Night of the Hangry Horde Pack
dlc.dlcdescription: Adds horde-style gameplay, spooky levels, and new chefs.
Adds beach-themed kitchens, water guns, and new recipes.
Adds a pack of new playable chefs.

title: Overcooked! All You Can Eat
gamedescription: Overcooked! All You Can Eat combines both Overcooked games with every DLC, remastered visuals, accessibility options, and full online cross platform co op.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds the Swedish Chef as a playable character.

title: Overcooked!
gamedescription: Overcooked! is a frantic cooperative cooking game where players work together to prepare meals in chaotic kitchens filled with hazards, shifting layouts, and escalating pressure.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds festive-themed kitchens, recipes, and chefs.
Adds new campaign levels, chefs, and environments.

title: PAW Patrol: Rescue Wheels Championship
gamedescription: PAW Patrol: Rescue Wheels Championship brings kid friendly kart racing with simple controls, colourful tracks, and all your favourite pups competing in fun local multiplayer races.

title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted
gamedescription: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted is a refreshed edition of the classic tower defense hit, featuring updated visuals, smoother performance, and the same iconic lawn defending gameplay.

title: PlateUp!
gamedescription: PlateUp! blends chaotic co op cooking with roguelike progression. Build, run, and expand your restaurant through increasingly demanding days, unlocking new dishes, layouts, and automation systems.

title: Police Simulator: Patrol Officers
gamedescription: Police Simulator: Patrol Officers puts you in the role of a U.S. patrol officer, handling traffic stops, accidents, investigations, and city patrols with both solo and online co op gameplay.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds highway patrol content and vehicle options.
Adds an urban terrain patrol vehicle.

title: Pool Nation
gamedescription: Pool Nation delivers a polished billiards experience with realistic physics, multiple game modes, trick shots, and both local and online competitive play.

title: Poppy Playtime: Chapter 1
gamedescription: Poppy Playtime: Chapter 1 introduces the abandoned Playtime Co. toy factory, where players solve puzzles and evade the terrifying Huggy Wuggy using the GrabPack tool.

title: Potion Craft
gamedescription: Potion Craft is a hands on alchemist simulator where you experiment with ingredients, brew potions, manage your shop, and craft recipes through a tactile, medieval style interface.

title: PowerWash Simulator
gamedescription: PowerWash Simulator lets you blast away dirt and grime with high-pressure washers across a variety of satisfying cleaning jobs, featuring solo play and online co-op.

title: Pure Chess
gamedescription: Pure Chess delivers a premium digital chess experience with beautifully crafted sets, multiple difficulty levels, tutorials, and both local and online multiplayer modes.

title: Pure Pool
gamedescription: Pure Pool delivers a hyper-realistic billiards experience with stunning visuals, precision physics, and a full suite of solo, local, and online multiplayer modes.

title: Rabbids: Party of Legends
gamedescription: Rabbids: Party of Legends brings chaotic multiplayer fun with over-the-top minigames inspired by Journey to the West, supporting up to four players in local party mode.

title: Radon Blast
gamedescription: Radon Blast is a fast-paced arcade shooter where players blast through waves of enemies with simple controls and retro-inspired gameplay.

title: Rayman Legends
gamedescription: Rayman Legends delivers fast-paced platforming with stunning hand-drawn visuals, inventive levels, rhythm-based stages, and seamless four-player local co-op.

title: Real Farm
gamedescription: Real Farm puts you in the boots of a modern farmer as you build your career, manage crops, expand your land, and grow your agricultural empire in an open-world farming simulation.

title: Red Matter
gamedescription: Red Matter is a story-driven VR adventure set during a dystopian sci-fi Cold War, featuring atmospheric environments, environmental puzzles, and immersive exploration on a mysterious alien moon.

title: Revenge Of The Savage Planet
gamedescription: Revenge of the Savage Planet is a comedic sci-fi exploration adventure where players investigate a vibrant alien world, uncover bizarre wildlife, and survive environmental hazards while uncovering corporate mysteries.

title: Risk
gamedescription: Risk on PS1 adapts the classic global domination board game into a digital format with animated battles, multiple rule sets, and support for up to six players in hot-seat multiplayer.

title: Rocket League
gamedescription: Rocket League blends high-speed vehicles with competitive soccer in a fast-paced, physics-driven multiplayer experience supporting local and online play for up to eight players.

title: Rugby League Live 4
gamedescription: Rugby League Live 4 delivers an authentic NRL experience with realistic stadiums, deep career mode, advanced player movement, and competitive local and online multiplayer.

title: Rush VR
gamedescription: Rush VR delivers high-speed wingsuit racing across massive mountain environments, featuring over 100 tracks, real-time weather, and competitive online multiplayer for up to 12 players.

title: Saturn Bomberman
gamedescription: Saturn Bomberman is a fast-paced multiplayer action game featuring explosive battles, power-ups, and support for up to 10 players using the Sega Saturn multitap. It is widely regarded as one of the best entries in the Bomberman series.

title: Scrabble
gamedescription: Scrabble on PS4 brings the classic word-building board game to life with multiple difficulty levels, online multiplayer, and modern UI enhancements while preserving the traditional gameplay experience.

title: Smurfs Kart
gamedescription: Smurfs Kart brings colorful kart racing action to the PS4, featuring iconic Smurf characters, unique special abilities, whimsical tracks, and competitive local multiplayer for up to four players.

title: Sonic Racing - CrossWorlds
gamedescription: Sonic Racing - CrossWorlds delivers fast-paced team-based kart racing across vibrant tracks inspired by the Sonic universe. Work together using unique team mechanics, character abilities, and cooperative boosts to secure victory in both local and online multiplayer modes.

dlc.dlcdescription: Adds the Blue Star Extreme Gear customization set.

title: Spy Chameleon
gamedescription: Spy Chameleon is a colorful stealth puzzle game where you infiltrate over 75 levels by changing colors to blend into the environment, avoid enemies, and complete objectives with precision and speed.

title: Stray
gamedescription: Stray is a third-person adventure where you explore a decaying cybercity as a lost cat, solving environmental puzzles, avoiding dangers, and uncovering the mysteries of a forgotten world alongside your drone companion B-12.

title: Street Fighter 30th Anniversary Collection
gamedescription: Street Fighter 30th Anniversary Collection brings together 12 legendary titles from the iconic fighting franchise, featuring arcade-perfect gameplay, online modes for select titles, museum content, and a comprehensive celebration of Street Fighters history.

title: Street Food Restaurant Owner
gamedescription: Street Food Restaurant Owner puts you in charge of running and expanding your own street food business. Prepare dishes, manage customers, upgrade equipment, and grow your culinary empire through a variety of fast-paced cooking challenges.

title: Superhot VR
gamedescription: Superhot VR transforms the iconic time-bending shooter into a fully immersive virtual reality experience. Time moves only when you move, creating intense strategic combat scenarios where precision, awareness, and physical movement are key to survival.

title: Supraland
gamedescription: Supraland is a first-person puzzle-adventure set in a miniature sandbox world. Combining exploration, combat, and clever environmental puzzles, it blends elements of Metroidvania design with fast-paced movement and creative problem-solving.

title: Surgeon Simulator: Experience Reality
gamedescription: Surgeon Simulator: Experience Reality brings the chaotic, physics-driven surgery gameplay into full VR. Perform outrageous operations with motion controls, interact with bizarre tools, and embrace the comedic mayhem only possible in virtual reality.

title: Tetris Effect: Connected
gamedescription: Tetris Effect: Connected enhances the award-winning Tetris experience with cooperative and competitive multiplayer modes, stunning visual effects, and immersive PSVR support. Feel the music, the rhythm, and the flow as every move transforms the world around you.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
gamedescription: The Amazing Spider-Man 2 expands the open-world web-slinging experience with new combat abilities, upgraded traversal, and a darker story that follows both Peter Parker and Spider-Man as they confront a rising criminal threat in New York City.

title: The Colonists
gamedescription: The Colonists is a relaxing settlement-building game where you guide a team of self-replicating robots as they explore, harvest resources, automate production chains, and build a thriving colony across a series of handcrafted missions.

title: The Escapists: The Walking Dead
gamedescription: The Escapists: The Walking Dead blends the strategic prison-escape gameplay of The Escapists with the iconic world of The Walking Dead. Guide Rick Grimes and the survivors through handcrafted levels, gather resources, craft tools, and escape deadly walker-filled zones.

title: The Escapists 2
gamedescription: The Escapists 2 expands the breakout formula with deeper crafting, larger prisons, and full cooperative and competitive multiplayer. Work together or against each other as you plan, improvise, and execute daring escapes across a variety of themed facilities.

dlc.dlcdescription: Escape from a circus-themed prison filled with performers, animals, and hazards.
A medieval-themed escape featuring traps, puzzles, and castle fortifications.
Break free from a heavily guarded jungle compound ruled by a strict regime.
A spooky, horror-themed escape set inside a haunted medical facility.

title: The Flame in the Flood
gamedescription: The Flame in the Flood is a wilderness survival adventure where you journey down a procedurally generated river, scavenging resources, crafting tools, and managing hunger, health, and weather as you guide Scout and her dog through a harsh post-societal America.

title: The Forest
gamedescription: The Forest is a first-person survival horror experience where you must gather resources, craft tools, build shelters, and fight off a tribe of cannibalistic mutants after surviving a plane crash on a mysterious island. Explore, survive, and uncover the islands dark secrets.

title: The Good Life
gamedescription: The Good Life is a quirky debt-repayment RPG where journalist Naomi Hayward investigates the secrets of Rainy Woods, a small English town whose residents transform into cats and dogs at night. Explore, photograph, farm, and uncover the mysteries hidden beneath its charming surface.

dlc.dlcname: Behind The Secret Of Rainy Woods
dlc.dlcdescription: Additional story content expanding the mysteries of Rainy Woods.

title: The House of the Dead 2: Remake
gamedescription: The House of the Dead 2: Remake brings the iconic arcade rail shooter back with modern visuals, improved controls, and faithfully recreated action. Battle hordes of undead creatures across branching paths as you fight to uncover the mystery behind the outbreak.

title: The Simpsons: Hit & Run
gamedescription: The Simpsons: Hit & Run blends open-world exploration with mission-based driving and platforming across Springfield. Play as multiple members of the Simpson family as you uncover a mysterious conspiracy involving strange events, hidden cameras, and cola-fueled chaos.

title: The Smurfs 2: The Prisoner of the Green Stone
gamedescription: The Smurfs 2: The Prisoner of the Green Stone is a colorful 3D adventure where you join a team of Smurfs on a mission to recover the fragments of the Green Stone. Explore vibrant environments, battle quirky enemies, and use unique Smurf abilities to save the day.

dlc.dlcdescription: Additional cosmetic outfits for your Smurfs.

title: The Smurfs: Mission Vileaf
gamedescription: The Smurfs: Mission Vileaf is a colorful 3D platforming adventure where you guide a team of Smurfs on a mission to stop Gargamels latest invention, the Vileaf. Explore vibrant worlds, use the Smurfizer to heal corrupted plants, and save the forest from destruction.

dlc.dlcdescription: Exclusive preorder cosmetic items for your Smurfs.

title: The Smurfs: Village Party
gamedescription: The Smurfs: Village Party is a colorful party game featuring dozens of mini-games, cooperative challenges, and competitive modes set across iconic Smurf locations. Play solo or with friends as you celebrate in a lively Smurf village festival.

title: The Stanley Parable: Ultra Deluxe
gamedescription: The Stanley Parable: Ultra Deluxe expands the original cult classic with new choices, new endings, and new surprises. Explore a surreal office environment where every decision branches into unexpected outcomes, blending humor, narrative twists, and meta commentary.

title: The Wild Eight
gamedescription: The Wild Eight is an isometric survival adventure where eight plane crash survivors must work together to endure the harsh Alaskan wilderness. Gather resources, craft tools, fight deadly wildlife, and uncover the mysterious secrets hidden in the frozen landscape.

title: Theme Park Simulator: Rollercoaster Paradise
gamedescription: Theme Park Simulator: Rollercoaster Paradise lets you take control of multiple amusement rides, including rollercoasters, ferris wheels, and more. Adjust speed, manage controls, and experience each attraction from both operator and passenger perspectives.

title: Thief Simulator
gamedescription: Thief Simulator blends stealth, planning, and open-world exploration as you break into houses, steal valuables, learn security patterns, and upgrade your tools. Scout neighborhoods, avoid police, and become the ultimate professional thief.

title: Think of the Children
gamedescription: Think of the Children is a frantic party game where players juggle chaotic parenting tasks across dangerous environments. Keep the kids alive, complete objectives, and survive the madness in fast-paced cooperative gameplay.

title: Time Crisis II
gamedescription: Time Crisis II is a fast-paced arcade rail shooter where players use precise timing and cover mechanics to battle through waves of enemies. Featuring two-player cooperative action, it delivers classic light-gun gameplay adapted for the PS2 era.

title: Time Loader
gamedescription: Time Loader is a story-driven puzzle platformer where you control a small robot sent back in time to prevent a tragic accident. Navigate physics-based environments, solve clever puzzles, and alter the past in ways that ripple into the future.

title: TMNT: Mutants Unleashed
gamedescription: TMNT: Mutants Unleashed is a fast-paced action adventure where the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles battle across New York City to stop a rising mutant threat. Fight enemies, unlock abilities, and experience a new story inspired by the TMNT universe.

dlc.dlcdescription: Classic 1984 comic-inspired skin for the Turtles.
Character skins and cosmetics inspired by the 1987 animated series.
Additional missions featuring new enemies and challenges.

title: TMNT: Splintered Fate
gamedescription: TMNT: Splintered Fate is a fast-paced roguelike action game where the Turtles battle through procedurally generated levels to rescue Master Splinter. Unlock abilities, upgrade gear, and fight iconic enemies in a dynamic co-op experience.

title: TMNT Arcade: Wrath of the Mutants
gamedescription: TMNT Arcade: Wrath of the Mutants brings the classic arcade beat 'em up experience to consoles with fast-paced combat, iconic villains, and four-player local co-op. Battle through mutant-filled stages inspired by the TMNT universe.

title: Tony Hawks American Wasteland
gamedescription: Tony Hawks American Wasteland delivers an open-world skateboarding experience with no loading screens, letting players explore Los Angeles while mastering tricks, completing missions, and customizing their skater and board.

title: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 1
gamedescription: Tony Hawks Pro Skater revolutionized skateboarding games with fluid controls, iconic levels, and a legendary soundtrack. Master tricks, complete objectives, and chain combos across classic skate parks in this genre-defining title.

title: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 1 + 2
gamedescription: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 1 + 2 faithfully remasters the iconic originals with updated visuals, refined controls, and all the classic levels and skaters. Chain massive combos, complete objectives, and relive the golden era of skateboarding with modern enhancements.

title: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 2
gamedescription: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 2 expands the groundbreaking original with improved controls, larger levels, and the introduction of the manual, enabling massive combo chains. Skate iconic parks, complete objectives, and experience one of the most acclaimed sports games ever made.

title: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 3
gamedescription: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 3 elevates the series with refined controls, larger levels, and the introduction of the revert, allowing players to chain even bigger combos. Skate iconic parks and experience one of the most acclaimed entries in the franchise.

title: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 3 + 4
gamedescription: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 3 + 4 brings together two iconic classics with enhanced visuals, refined mechanics, and faithfully recreated levels. Experience the evolution of the series with smooth controls, massive combos, and legendary skate parks.

title: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 4
gamedescription: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 4 shifts the series into a more open-ended structure, offering larger levels, tougher challenges, and expanded trick mechanics. Explore massive skate parks, complete objectives at your own pace, and push your combo skills further than ever.

title: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 5
gamedescription: Tony Hawks Pro Skater 5 attempts to revive the classic arcade skating formula with new levels, missions, and online multiplayer. Chain combos, complete objectives, and skate with friends in large online sessions.

title: Tony Hawks Project 8
gamedescription: Tony Hawks Project 8 rebuilds the series with a new physics system, expanded trick mechanics, and a more grounded skating style. Explore open environments, complete challenges, and work your way up the ranks to become part of Tony Hawk's elite Project 8 team.

title: Tony Hawks Underground
gamedescription: Tony Hawks Underground transforms the series with a full story mode, character progression, and the ability to get off your board. Travel the world, complete challenges, and rise from a local skater to a pro in this fan favorite entry.

title: Tony Hawks Underground 2
gamedescription: Tony Hawks Underground 2 blends classic skating with over the top antics in a world tour led by Tony Hawk and Bam Margera. Complete chaotic challenges, explore diverse locations, and experience the most outrageous entry in the series.

title: Trailmakers
gamedescription: Trailmakers is a creative sandbox adventure where you build vehicles, explore vast environments, and complete challenges using physics based construction tools. Craft cars, planes, boats, and more as you journey through open worlds alone or with friends.

dlc.dlcdescription: A themed add on that introduces aviation inspired cosmetic parts, letting players decorate their creations with wings, decals, and flight style accessories.
A collection of bold, high contrast decals designed to give vehicles a more aggressive or stylized look, ideal for action focused builds.
Adds expressive stickers and symbols that let players personalize their vehicles with emotions, icons, and character driven designs.
A winter themed cosmetic pack featuring icy patterns, frosted textures, and cold weather style decals for snow inspired builds.
A fun cosmetic pack that adds a variety of hats and headgear players can equip on their characters for extra personality.
A nautical themed cosmetic set that includes ocean inspired decals and styling options, perfect for boats, submarines, and maritime builds.
A gearhead focused cosmetic pack featuring mechanical style decals, metal textures, and industrial inspired visual upgrades.
A themed cosmetic set that adds fiery decals, heat themed patterns, and bold visual elements for high energy vehicle designs.
A rescue service inspired cosmetic pack with emergency style decals, hazard markings, and utility focused visual elements.
A collection of new character skins that let players customize their avatar with fresh outfits and visual styles
A sci fi themed cosmetic pack featuring space inspired decals, futuristic patterns, and astronaut style visual elements.
A military themed cosmetic set with tactical decals, rugged textures, and frontline style markings for combat inspired builds.
Adds a selection of new surface textures players can apply to their vehicles, expanding creative options for material variety.
Another texture focused add on that introduces additional material patterns, allowing for more detailed and visually distinct builds.

title: Trash Sailors
gamedescription: Trash Sailors is a hand drawn co op adventure where players navigate a flooded world using a raft built from scavenged junk. Fight off monsters, manage resources, and survive chaotic storms as you and your crew work together to stay afloat.

title: Tridents Tale
gamedescription: Tridents Tale is an action adventure experience set in a mystical world shaped by ancient oceanic powers. Players embark on a journey filled with exploration, combat, and discovery as they uncover the secrets behind the legendary trident and the forces that seek to control it.

title: Trivial Pursuit Live
gamedescription: Trivial Pursuit Live brings the classic trivia board game to life with a fast-paced TV game show format. Answer questions across multiple categories, compete with friends locally or online, and race to fill your wedges before your opponents.

title: Trivial Pursuit Live! 2
gamedescription: Trivial Pursuit Live! 2 brings the classic trivia experience back with new questions, updated visuals, and a lively game show presentation. Compete locally or online as you race to fill your wedges and outsmart your opponents across a wide range of categories.

title: Tropico 6
gamedescription: Tropico 6 puts you in the shoes of El Presidente as you build, manage, and shape your island nation across multiple eras. Construct vast cities, influence politics, manage factions, and guide your people through diplomacy, corruption, and global power struggles.

dlc.dlcdescription: A mission driven expansion focused on drone technology, disaster relief, and new ways to manage Tropicos skies.
A cosmetic pack featuring an exclusive palace design, outfit, and accessories to style El Presidente in true luxury.
Adds festival grounds, themed events, and new mechanics that let you boost happiness and tourism through celebrations.
Introduces new health focused challenges, viral outbreaks, and tools to manage public safety and population stability.
A corruption themed expansion adding lobbying mechanics, influence systems, and new ways to manipulate political power.
A space focused expansion introducing rocket programs, orbital missions, and new ways to compete in the space race.
Adds eco focused buildings, nature driven policies, and new ways to balance development with environmental preservation.
A social media themed expansion introducing influencer mechanics, celebrity interactions, and reputation based gameplay.
A finance focused DLC adding market manipulation, economic fluctuations, and new tools to control Tropicos economy.
A tourism driven expansion featuring new beach attractions, coastal buildings, and ways to boost island vacation appeal.

title: Ultimate Runner
gamedescription: Ultimate Runner is a fast paced endless runner where players dodge obstacles, collect power ups, and push for the highest score across increasingly challenging stages.

title: UNO
gamedescription: UNO brings the classic card game to life with vibrant visuals, customizable rules, and fast-paced multiplayer action. Play locally or online, stack cards, challenge opponents, and enjoy themed variations that add new twists to the iconic gameplay.

dlc.dlcdescription: A premium black-and-gold themed deck celebrating UNOs 50th anniversary, featuring elegant visuals and a commemorative coin rule.
A crossover deck inspired by Immortals Fenyx Rising, adding mythological powers, divine effects, and new ways to shift the flow of the match.
A two sided deck that flips between light and dark modes, introducing harsher penalties and unpredictable momentum shifts.
A colorful, rhythm inspired deck based on Just Dance, featuring energetic visuals and special cards that shake up the tempo of the game.
A festive deck filled with unpredictable party themed effects, adding chaotic twists and high energy rule variations.
A whimsical deck inspired by Rayman, introducing playful abilities, character driven effects, and unique card interactions.
A Far Cry themed deck featuring guerrilla style twists, faction inspired abilities, and new ways to disrupt your opponents.
A Viking inspired deck based on Assassins Creed Valhalla, adding powerful rune effects and battle driven card mechanics.
A seasonal deck filled with snowy visuals, frosty effects, and chilled out twists that give UNO a winter makeover.

title: Untitled Goose Game
gamedescription: Untitled Goose Game is a mischievous slapstick adventure where you play as a horrible goose causing chaos in a quiet village. Honk, steal, distract, and outsmart the townsfolk as you complete playful objectives and create delightful mayhem.

title: VR Ping Pong Pro
gamedescription: VR Ping Pong Pro brings realistic table tennis to life with immersive VR physics, detailed environments, and competitive online play. Master spin, timing, and precision as you challenge AI opponents or players around the world.

title: VR Ping Pong
gamedescription: VR Ping Pong is a virtual reality table tennis experience featuring realistic physics, multiple difficulty levels, and immersive environments. Practice your skills, challenge AI opponents, and refine your timing and precision in full VR.

title: Wheel of Fortune
gamedescription: Wheel of Fortune brings the classic TV game show to PS4 with thousands of puzzles, customizable contestants, and fast-paced multiplayer. Spin the wheel, guess letters, and solve word challenges across a variety of themed stages.

title: Who Wants To Be A Millionaire
gamedescription: Who Wants To Be A Millionaire brings the iconic quiz show to PS4 with hundreds of questions, themed sets, lifelines, and competitive multiplayer. Test your knowledge, climb the money ladder, and challenge friends locally or online.

dlc.dlcdescription: A themed question pack inspired by classic suspense cinema, adding new categories and dramatic twists to the quiz experience.
A family friendly question pack featuring Smurfs themed trivia, playful categories, and lighthearted challenges.
A themed pack inspired by classic Tintin adventures, adding exploration focused questions and story driven trivia.

title: Worms Armageddon - Anniversary Edition
gamedescription: Worms Armageddon  Anniversary Edition brings the classic turn based chaos back with enhanced visuals, refined controls, and modern multiplayer support. Command your squad of worms, unleash outrageous weapons, and battle across destructible landscapes in this definitive edition of a strategy icon.

title: Wreckfest
gamedescription: Wreckfest delivers full-contact racing with realistic physics, destructible vehicles, and chaotic competition. Smash, crash, and outdrive rivals across demolition derbies, banger races, and custom events with deep vehicle tuning and a massive roster of cars.

dlc.dlcdescription: A collection of iconic American muscle and classic steel, built for raw power and heavy-hitting collisions.
A rugged set of offbeat vehicles inspired by backwoods engineering and improvised racing culture.
A trio of classic banger racing machines built for high-impact collisions and unpredictable track battles.
A themed pack featuring fast, agile vehicles inspired by cinematic chases and high-speed escapes.
A cosmetic pack adding humorous rooftop decorations to give your rides a chaotic personality boost.
A set of heavily modified machines built for extreme durability and over-the-top destruction.
A rugged selection of off-road vehicles designed for dirt tracks, jumps, and brutal terrain.
A tribute pack featuring legendary racing icons reimagined for Wreckfests destructive arenas.
A set of unpredictable, high-risk vehicles built for chaotic driving and aggressive playstyles.
A nostalgic pack featuring retro-inspired vehicles perfect for smashing, crashing, and ramming opponents.
A gritty collection of rusted, patched-together machines built for scrappy, underdog victories.
A cosmetic pack adding new rims, armor pieces, and steel accessories to customize your demolition beasts.

title: WWE 2K25
gamedescription: WWE 2K25 celebrates 25 years of 2K wrestling games with enhanced animations, expanded match types, upgraded MyGM and Universe modes, and a massive roster of WWE Superstars and Legends. Experience high impact action, cinematic presentation, and deep customization across single player and multiplayer modes.

title: Yatzi
gamedescription: Yatzi is a digital take on the classic dice rolling game, offering quick rounds, simple controls, and local multiplayer support. Roll the dice, choose your scoring strategy, and compete for the highest total across multiple categories.

title: Youtubers Life OMG
gamedescription: Youtubers Life OMG is a life simulation game where you create videos, grow your channel, manage your lifestyle, and build a career as an online creator. Balance content production, social life, and upgrades as you rise to internet fame.
